settings.heading: Hydration Bladders Add Bulk. Add Hassle. Add Complexity.
For Wildland Firefighters
settings.description: Operational hydration that won't fail when the heat hits triple digits. Built for the fire line.

settings.heading: For Hikers & Backpackers
settings.description: Ditch the heavy bladder. Upgrade your trail experience with ice-cold water access.

settings.review_text: We've had issues with bladders popping in high heat. Hydrolid changed that. My Nalgene is now my hydration pack, and it doesn't fail.
The Hydrolid is standard gear for me now. It's built for the same conditions we are—tough, reliable, and it actually keeps water cool.
It's the only hydration system that doesn't feel like a cheap plastic toy. The military-grade construction is evident from the first use.

settings.title: Go

settings.heading: Install in seconds
settings.description: Convert your insulated water bottle into a hands-free hydration system. Simply connect a drinking tube to a wide mouth water bottle. HydroLid works with insulated bottles from CamelBak, ThermoFlask and more to enjoy ice cold water on the go.

settings.question: What is HydroLid, and what makes it unique?
settings.answer: HydroLid offers innovative hydration solutions designed for extreme environments and outdoor recreation. Founded by a wildland firefighter, our products ensure temperature-stable hydration without the need to stop and access your insulated bottle. From fire & fieldwork to strenuous adventuring, our hands-free hydration kits enhance your experience.

settings.question: Are HydroLid products compatible with other insulated bottles?
settings.answer: Yes, HydroLid works with wide-mouth Hydro Flask, ThermoFlask and CamelBak insulated bottles, offering a versatile solution to fit various popular bottle brands.

settings.question: How can HydroLid products be adapted to various hydration capacities and uses?
settings.answer: HydroLid offers a range of kits that can be customized for different hydration needs, from the HydroLid Base Kit for everyday use to the HydroLid Field & Fire Kit for simultaneous drawing from two bottles.

settings.question: How does HydroLid support hydration needs during firefighting operations?
settings.answer: HydroLid provides firefighters with quick and hands-free hydration access, allowing them to stay focused on the task without having to stop to access their insulated bottles.

settings.question: Is HydroLid compatible with the gear typically used by fire departments?
settings.answer: Yes, HydroLid is designed with versatility in mind and can be used with wide-mouth bottles such as Hydro Flask, ThermoFlask and CamelBak insulated bottles.

settings.heading: Find Your Answers Fast
settings.description: Everything you need to know about compatibility, durability, and field use.
